title: The Brigand
writer: George Bruce, Jesse Lasky Jr., Alexandre Dumas
actors: Anthony Dexter, Jody Lawrance, Gale Robbins
plot: In the 1800s, after an assassination attempt by Prince Ramon against the king of Mandorra, a brigand resembling the king surreptitiously impersonates the incapacitated monarch in order to throw off the plotters.
